arts.ttl: Mallorca health: Sick-note Mallorca causing concern: Balearic government plans to cure the problem
arts.sum: According to the unions, mental health problems are a major cause of long-term sick leave. Public bodies first,” says Cabrer, adding that the plan will also include measures to protect workers’ mental health, occupational risk management campaigns and actions to promote work-life balance.

arts.ttl: Sevilla star Dodi Lukébakio insists he’ll stay at the Ramón Sánchez-Pizjuán
arts.sum: Dodi Lukébakio has been the one redeeming factor from a fairly disappointing season for Sevilla. The Belgian has scored 10 goals in 25 appearances for the club so far this…
